name: Asian Ginseng
summary: Panax ginseng lean herb row for high-speed phytochemical ingestion.
description: Panax ginseng lean herb row for high-speed phytochemical ingestion.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Effects of Ginseng on Cognitive Function: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
sources.citation: 15 RCTs/671 participants; memory effect signal; no positive effect on overall cognition, attention, executive function.

claimMap.claim: Ginseng may have a small memory-support signal, but not enough to claim broad cognition, attention, or executive-function benefits.
claimMap.notes: Ginseng may have a small memory-support signal, but not enough to claim broad cognition, attention, or executive-function benefits.

dosage: Ginseng preparations varied; species/preparation split needed. Dose/form ambiguous; schedule dose pass.
typical_dosage: Ginseng preparations varied; species/preparation split needed. Dose/form ambiguous; schedule dose pass.
